name: Quiche Lorraine
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crust.
2. Crumble the bacon and sprinkle over the bottom of the pre-made pie crust.
3. Sprinkle the shredded Swiss cheese evenly over the bacon.
4. In a blender container, combine the half and half, salt, nutmeg, ham cubes, eggs, and sliced onion.
5. Blend on high for 10 seconds.
6. Blend until all ingredients are well mixed but do not overblend.
7. Pour the blended mixture into the pie crust over the bacon and cheese.
8. To freeze: flash freeze the assembled quiche in a freezer bag.
9. When frozen, cover with aluminum foil and seal in a jumbo freezer bag.
10. To prepare: thaw the quiche completely before baking.
11. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees for 30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the filling is set.
12. Serve warm. Serving ideas include Green Salad, Caesar Salad, or Fresh French Bread.
